content.full_text:
February 26, 2003

Steve Sobotta
65767 Avenida Ladera
Desert Hot Springs, CA 92240

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-027

Dear Mr. Sobotta:

This correspondence is written confirmation that your request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act1 has been withdrawn.

You informed us in your February 12, 2003, request for written advice that you required an answer by close of business on February 25, 2003. I informed you that we would be unable to generate analysis of your request in the allotted time frame. You subsequently submitted a letter on February 25, 2003, withdrawing the request. I enclose a copy of regulation 18329 for your review as a reference for future advice submissions.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: [signature]
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg
Enclosure

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
